title: Phishing Attack Investigation - Credential Harvesting Campaign
executive_summary: The phishing case shows delivery of a lookalike Microsoft security email, redirect to a fake portal, credential harvesting indicators, and unauthorized mailbox access.
forensic_conclusion: Evidence supports a high-severity credential phishing incident requiring mailbox audit, password reset, MFA validation, and domain/URL blocking.
key_findings: Brand impersonation and urgent verification lure
Suspicious redirect chain to fake login portal
Credential dump indicator and suspicious login
Mailbox rule activity after account compromise
